items.caption: Four hoodies with unique space-themed designs, each featuring a different astronaut spacesuit. the hoodies are presented on mannequins against a white background. the designs include nasa logos, space shuttle patches, and various space-related graphics. the hoodies are styled in a casual manner, suitable for everyday wear, and are likely intended for both men and women.

Two white hoodies with a black graphic design on the back. the design features a silhouette of cinderella's castle with the names "prince" and "princess" inside the castle. the year "2018" is also included in the design. the hoodies are displayed on a mannequin, with the woman's hoodie showing the design on the left side and the man's hoodie on the right side. the text "pullover hooded" is visible, indicating the style of the hoodies. the overall style of the image is promotional, likely for the purpose of showcasing the hoodies for sale.

Two black hoodies against a white background. the hoodie on the left is shown from the front, while the one on the right is shown from the back. both hoodies feature a zipper closure and a large, white, stylized letter 'w' on the front. the hoodies appear to be made of a thick, velvety material, suitable for cold weather. the style of the hoodies suggests a casual, hip-hop influence.
Two hoodies with vibrant, colorful patterns featuring monkey heads, displayed against a white background.

A collection of four hoodies laid out on a white, fluffy surface. the hoodies feature a variety of colors and patterns, including a camouflage design and a pink and blue striped pattern. one hoodie prominently features a graphic of a boston terrier's face. a small boston terrier puppy is lying next to the hoodies, appearing to be resting or sleeping. the text "4 color options!" is superimposed over the image, suggesting that the hoodies are available in multiple colors. the overall style of the image is casual and promotional, likely intended to showcase the hoodies for sale.
two people in hoodies sitting at a table outdoors.
